hooks.command: for d in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" "$CHP_BASE" "$HOME/Desktop/chp"; do [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-wrapper.sh" ] && exec bash "$d/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-wrapper.sh"; done; exit 0
for d in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" "$CHP_BASE" "$HOME/Desktop/chp"; do [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/post-tool-wrapper.sh" ] && exec bash "$d/.claude/hooks/post-tool-wrapper.sh"; done; exit 0
